title: Response Mapping
description: Binding block that maps a live provider response body onto a named resource. Implementation, not CDL — the resource is the stable anchor; provider paths (JSONPath) drift. Validated + executed above the connector (ADD-12 / RFC-0006).

collection.description: JSONPath to the list of items in the provider body (e.g. $.results[*]). Absent = a single resource object at the response root.

map.description: resource field name → JSONPath into a single item (relative to `collection`, else the response root).

oneOf.description: JSONPath; the mapped field keeps the resource's own required-ness.

required.description: Only `false` is allowed — a mapping may loosen a required field to degrade gracefully, never tighten one.
